description: The SumTotal Learn domain contains comprehensive, real-world learning data, encompassing all tables necessary to capture learning activities, user progress, courses, events, and related metadata. It serves as a complete representation of an organization's learning ecosystem.
title: SumTotal Learn Training Platform

tables.name: persondomain_sumtotal
tables.description: This table captures the relationships between individuals (persons), their associated domains, and roles within the Sumtotal Learn system, including metadata about creation and modification.

tables.name: personrelation_sumtotal
tables.description: This table captures the relationships between individuals and their respective managers within the organization, providing a comprehensive view of reporting structures.

tables.name: personorganization_sumtotal
tables.description: This table aggregates information about individuals and their associated organizations, including their primary status, joining dates, and synchronization details.

tables.name: tbl_tmx_userrequiredact_sumtotal
tables.description: This table serves as a source for tracking user-required activities and their statuses within the Sumtotal Learn platform, providing insights into user engagement and compliance.

tables.name: actlabel_sumtotal
tables.description: This table serves as a source for summarizing activity labels within the Sumtotal Learn platform, providing essential metadata about each label.

tables.name: jobuser_sumtotal
tables.description: This table serves as a source for summarizing job user data within the Sumtotal Learn system, capturing essential attributes related to job templates and user associations.

tables.name: organization_sumtotal
tables.description: This table serves as a comprehensive source of organizational data, capturing essential attributes and relationships for effective management and analysis within the Sumtotal Learn platform.

tables.name: person_sumtotal
tables.description: This table contains comprehensive information about individuals, including personal identifiers, names, demographics, and employment details, serving as a source for various applications within the Sumtotal Learn system.

tables.name: tbl_tmx_attempt_sumtotal
tables.description: This table captures detailed information about user attempts in the Sumtotal Learn system, including metrics on performance, status, and user engagement.

tables.name: tbl_tmx_activity_sumtotal
tables.description: This table serves as a comprehensive source for tracking and managing activities within the Sumtotal Learn platform, capturing essential details about each activity's configuration, scheduling, and participant management.

knowledge_base.name: sumtotal_learn_knowledge_base
knowledge_base.description: Knowledge base for SumTotal Learn Training Platform

examples.name: sumtotal_learn_example
examples.description: Example of SumTotal Learn Training Platform
